# Coronado Gold

> Fine gold jewelry brand based in Hialeah, Florida. Specializing in handcrafted 14k and 18k gold rings and necklaces.

## About

Coronado Gold is a fine jewelry brand offering handcrafted gold pieces — rings, necklaces, and more — made with precision and elegance. Located at 49 W 3rd St, Hialeah, FL 33010.

## Products

- Gold Rings: handcrafted 14k and 18k gold rings in a variety of styles
- Gold Necklaces: elegant gold necklace designs for every occasion

## Contact

- Phone: (786) 367-7012
- Email: coronadogoldjewelry@gmail.com
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/coronado.gold
